source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
motif: before/after keycap diptych with UV-and-peroxide process arrow
subject: Two keycap side-profile silhouettes: left cap filled with a low-opacity coral wash and sparse coral dots suggesting oxidized bromine byproducts ("before", yellowed ABS); right cap drawn as a clean unfilled outline ("after", restored). A coral process arrow runs between them, topped by a small UV sun-and-rays glyph and labeled "UV" / "H2O2 + UV"; bronze theme dot at upper-right margin. Splash color matches this article's existing inline-viz set (oxidation-cycle.svg, process-strip.svg, scope-ledger.svg) for a cohesive coral accent across all of the article's art.
